frictions.description: agent-browser snapshot returned no interactive elements because the page never reached the custom view UI state.

blockers.description: Local app returned HTTP 500 Internal Server Error for the edge fixture route and base locale route, preventing block-level UI validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried via browser reload, re-opened URL, and validated with curl; all attempts continued to return 500.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions. All 7 are blocked by reproducible HTTP 500 responses on http://localhost:3100/en/ut-cv-edge-353a918a (and /en), so block rendering behavior could not be observed.
